message:
test(pipeline): add condition logical op and parser validation tests

conditions_test.go:
- TestFindLogicalOpFlexible: AND/OR detection with/without spaces,
  at end of expression, inside parens vs outer scan
- TestFindLogicalOp_EdgeCases: operators in quoted strings (single/double),
  escaped quotes, nested parens, operator at start/end positions

parser_test.go:
- TestIsValidRoute: validate RoutingStrategy enum values (least_loaded,
  first_available, round_robin) and reject unknown/empty
- TestIsValidErrorAction: validate ErrorAction enum (fail, continue, retry)
- TestIsValidWaitCondition: validate WaitCondition enum (completion, idle,
  time, none)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
